title: Dio's Nether Ore
description: Dio's Nether Ore is an ore generation mod focused on adding ore to enhance exploration
body: ## About Dio's Nether Ore Dio's Nether Ore is an ore generation mod focused on adding ore to enhance exploration. ## Getting Started Dio's Nether Ore adds a variant of all vanilla ore that drops between two and six nuggets (Non-vanilla nugget added by [Dio's Extended Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/dios-extended-resources)). You can find a small quantity of those in every Nether biome. ### To enhance exploration, we increase ore generation in some biome: #### Nether Coal Ore You can find more Nether coal ore in Basalt Deltas. #### Nether Copper Ore You can find more Nether copper ore in Crimson Forest. #### Nether Diamond Ore You can find more Nether diamond ore in Warped Forest. #### Nether Iron Ore You can find more Nether iron ore in Crimson Forest. #### Nether Lapis Lazuli Ore You can find more Nether lapis lazuli ore in Soul Sand Vally. #### Nether Redstone Ore You can find more Nether redstone ore in Nether Wastes.
